Recipient: Mr. E. Baraize, Director of Works, Antiquities Service, at Abydos, via Balianah
Brief_Summary: The Director General of the Antiquities Service informs Mr. E. Baraize that funds have been allocated for excavation work at Abydos, Deir el-Bahari, and Ramose, effective May 1st, 1927, to continue the current campaign, with purchases made in Cairo not to be charged against these credits.
English_Translation:
ANTIQUITIES SERVICE
----
[Handwritten Arabic: 'Administrative personnel']

(FORM No. 1533, F.C.)

ANTIQUITIES SERVICE. Cairo, April 28, 1927.

GENERAL DIRECTORATE. [Handwritten Arabic: 'S. W. - 2 - S. W.']

N° 22.20/17 Subject: [Handwritten Arabic: 'S. W.']

Attached documents

Mr. Director of Works,

Following my letter of the 21st instant,
N°22.20/17, I have the honor to inform you
that we are granting you the following credits,
effective from May 1st next, to enable you to
continue your work on the various sites
until the end of this campaign:
L.E. 270 for the Abydos site
L.E. 30 " " Deir el-Bahari site
L.E. 300 " " Ramose site.

It is understood that purchases made in
Cairo according to your orders will not be
charged against these credits.

Please accept, Mr. Director of
Works, the assurance of my distinguished
consideration.

THE DIRECTOR GENERAL,
[Stamp: EGYPT GOVERNMENT 152 D.]
[Handwritten Arabic: 'S. W.']

Mr. E. Baraize,
Director of Works,
Antiquities Service,
at Abydos, via Balianah

[Stamp: illegible circular stamp with Arabic numerals]
[Handwritten Arabic: 'S. W.']
Stamps_and_Annotations: Handwritten Arabic: 'س. و. - ٢- س. و.' (S. W. - 2 - S. W.)
Illegible circular stamp with Arabic numerals
Full_Transcription:
SERVICE DES ANTIQUITES
----
[Handwritten Arabic: افراد اداري]

(FORM No. 1533, F.C.)

SE VICE DES ANTIQUITÉS. Le Caire, le 28 Avril 1927.

DIRECTION GÉNÉRALE. [Handwritten Arabic: س. و. -
٢-
س. و.]

Nº 22.20/17 Objet: [Handwritten Arabic: س. و.]

Pièces jointes

Monsieur le Directeur de Travaux,

Faisant suite à ma lettre du 21 courant,
Nº22.20/17, j'ai l'honneur de vous faire savoir
que nous vous accordons les crédits suivants à
partir du 1er Mai prochain pour vous permettre de
continuer vos travaux sur les différents chantiers
jusqu'à la fin de cette campagne :
L.E.270 pour le chantier d'Abydos
L.E.030 " " de Deir el-Bahari
L.E.300 " " de Ramose.

Il est entendu que les achats faits au
Caire suivant vos commandes ne seront pas
imputés sur ces crédits.

Veuillez agréer, Monsieur le Directeur de
Travaux, l'assurance de ma considération dis-
tinguée.

LE DIRECTEUR GENERAL,
[Stamp: EGYPT GOVERNMENT 152 D.]
[Handwritten Arabic: س. و.]

Monsieur E.Baraize,
Directeur de Travaux,
Service des Antiquités,
à Abydos, par Balianah

[Stamp: illegible circular stamp with Arabic numerals]
[Handwritten Arabic: س. و.]
